results.title: Machine operator for a day: Highlights from Bobcat Demo Days 2026
results.description: On 26 May 2026, LECTURA attended Bobcat Demo Days at the Dobříš Campus, located near Prague in Czechia.

results.title: Messi’s 200th appearance and more: All you need to know before Argentina-Algeria clash
results.description: Defending champions Argentina are set to launch their World Cup title defense mission when they take on Algeria in their opening Group J match at the Kansas City Stadium in Missouri on Wednesday morning. The match is scheduled to start at 7:00 am (Bangladesh time).
